---
title: "Dataset Work"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-05"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE)
```

```{r}
library(here)
library(readr)
library(data.table)

casualties <- fread("dft-road-casualty-statistics-casualty-1979-latest-published-year.csv")[collision_year >= 2015]

collisions <- fread("dft-road-casualty-statistics-collision-1979-latest-published-year.csv")[collision_year >= 2015]

vehicles <- fread("dft-road-casualty-statistics-vehicle-1979-latest-published-year.csv")[collision_year >= 2015]

la_ons_district_names <- read_csv(here("local-authority-ons-district-names.csv"))
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(stringr)
library(janitor)

# Select relevant columns and restrict data to 2015 onwards

casualties_1 <- casualties |> 
  select(collision_index, collision_year, vehicle_reference, casualty_reference, sex_of_casualty, age_of_casualty, casualty_severity, casualty_type) |> 
  filter(collision_year >= 2015)

collisions_1 <- collisions |> 
  select(collision_index, collision_year, longitude, latitude, date, day_of_week, time, local_authority_district, local_authority_ons_district, first_road_class, road_type, speed_limit, junction_detail, junction_control, pedestrian_crossing, light_conditions, urban_or_rural_area) |>
  filter(collision_year >= 2015)

collisions_1 <- collisions_1 |>
  left_join(
    la_ons_district_names |> select(code, la_name),
    by = c("local_authority_ons_district" = "code")
  )


vehicles_1 <- vehicles |> 
  select(collision_index, collision_year, vehicle_reference, vehicle_type) |> 
  filter(collision_year >= 2015)

```

```{r}
# Merge casualty data with collision data

cas_coll <- left_join(casualties_1, collisions_1, by = c("collision_index", "collision_year"))

# Merge vehicle data

full_data <- left_join(cas_coll, vehicles_1, by = c("collision_index", "collision_year", "vehicle_reference"))

```

```{r}
# Filter dataset to include only fatal or serious casualties

ksi_data <- full_data |> 
  filter(casualty_severity %in% c(1, 2))

# All casualties
all_casualties <- full_data

# Fatalities only
fatalities <- full_data |>
  filter(casualty_severity == 1)

```

```{r}
# Replace "-1" values with NA for numeric variables in ksi data

ksi_data <- ksi_data |> 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~na_if(., -1)))

# Count missing values in each column

na_summary_ksi_data <- ksi_data |> 
  summarise(across(everything(), ~sum(is.na(.)))) |> 
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "column", values_to = "na_count") |> 
  mutate(
    total_rows = nrow(ksi_data),
    na_percent = (na_count / total_rows) * 100
  )

na_summary_ksi_data

# Replace "-1" values with NA for numeric variables in all casualties data

all_casualties <- all_casualties |> 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~na_if(., -1)))

# Count missing values in each column

na_summary_all_casualties <- all_casualties |> 
  summarise(across(everything(), ~sum(is.na(.)))) |> 
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "column", values_to = "na_count") |> 
  mutate(
    total_rows = nrow(all_casualties),
    na_percent = (na_count / total_rows) * 100
  )

na_summary_all_casualties

# Replace "-1" values with NA for numeric variables in fatalities data

fatalities <- fatalities |> 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~na_if(., -1)))

# Count missing values in each column

na_summary_fatalities <- fatalities |> 
  summarise(across(everything(), ~sum(is.na(.)))) |> 
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "column", values_to = "na_count") |> 
  mutate(
    total_rows = nrow(fatalities),
    na_percent = (na_count / total_rows) * 100
  )

na_summary_fatalities
```


```{r}
ksi_trend <- ksi_data |>
  group_by(collision_year) |>
  summarise(KSI = n())

ksi_trend

ggplot(ksi_trend, aes(x = collision_year, y = KSI)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    title = "KSI Casualties Over Time",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Number of KSI"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
 
fatalities <- fatalities |>
  group_by(collision_year) |>
  summarise(fatalities_count = n())

# Fatalities trend
ggplot(fatalities, aes(x = collision_year, y = fatalities_count)) +
  geom_line(color = "darkblue", size = 1) +
  geom_point(color = "darkblue") +
  labs(
    title = "Trend of Fatalities Over Years",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Number of Fatalities"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```


```{r}
library(here)
library(sf)

# Load UK and Ireland map

uk_ir_shp_df <- bind_rows(
  st_read(paste0("/vsizip/", here("Ireland_Boundaries-shp.zip"), "/Country_Boundaries.shp"), quiet = TRUE),
  st_read(paste0("/vsizip/", here("UK_Boundaries-shp.zip"), "/Country_Boundaries.shp"), quiet = TRUE)
)

# Test Map

Test_Map <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = uk_ir_shp_df, fill = "lightblue") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
  ggtitle("UK and Ireland Map")

Test_Map

Test_Map_Coordinates <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = uk_ir_shp_df, fill = "snow2") +                                  
  geom_point(data = ksi_data,                                          
             aes(x = longitude, y = latitude), 
             size = 1.5,
             alpha = 0.02) 

Test_Map_Coordinates
            
```


```{r}
la_ksi <- ksi_data |>
  group_by(la_name) |>
  summarise(KSI = n()) |>
  arrange(desc(KSI))

top10_la <- la_ksi |>
  slice_max(KSI, n = 10)

top10_la_plot <- ggplot(top10_la, aes(x = reorder(la_name, KSI), y = KSI)) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Top 10 Local Authorities by KSI Casualties",
    x = "Local Authority",
    y = "Number of KSI"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

top10_la_plot

```

```{r}
road_user_totals <- ksi_data |>
  filter(!is.na(casualty_type), casualty_type != -1) |>
  group_by(casualty_type) |>
  summarise(total_KSI = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
  arrange(desc(total_KSI))

top5_road_users <- road_user_totals |> slice_head(n = 5)
top5_road_users

road_user_yearly <- ksi_data |>
  filter(!is.na(casualty_type), casualty_type != -1,
         casualty_type %in% top5_road_users$casualty_type) |>
  group_by(collision_year, casualty_type) |>
  summarise(KSI = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(casualty_type = factor(casualty_type, levels = top5_road_users$casualty_type))


road_user_yearly_plot <- ggplot(road_user_yearly,
       aes(x = factor(collision_year), y = KSI, fill = casualty_type)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge", colour = "black") +
  labs(
    title = "KSI by Road User Type (Top 5) Per Year",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Number of KSI",
    fill = "Road User Type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

road_user_yearly_plot
```

```{r}
urban_rural_yearly <- ksi_data |>
  filter(!is.na(urban_or_rural_area), urban_or_rural_area != -1) |>
  group_by(collision_year, urban_or_rural_area) |>
  summarise(KSI = n(), .groups = "drop")

urban_rural_yearly_plot <- ggplot(urban_rural_yearly, aes(x = collision_year, y = KSI, colour = factor(urban_or_rural_area))) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    title = "KSI by Urban/Rural Area Over Time",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Number of KSI",
    colour = "Area Type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

urban_rural_yearly_plot
```

```{r}
road_class_yearly <- ksi_data |>
  filter(!is.na(first_road_class), first_road_class != -1) |>
  group_by(collision_year, first_road_class) |>
  summarise(KSI = n(), .groups = "drop")

road_class_yearly_plot <- ggplot(road_class_yearly, aes(x = collision_year, y = KSI, colour = factor(first_road_class))) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    title = "KSI by Road Class Over Time",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Number of KSI",
    colour = "Road Class"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

road_class_yearly_plot
```

```{r}
speed_yearly <- ksi_data |>
  filter(!is.na(speed_limit), speed_limit != -1) |>
  group_by(collision_year, speed_limit) |>
  summarise(KSI = n(), .groups = "drop")

speed_yearly_plot <- ggplot(speed_yearly, aes(x = collision_year, y = KSI, colour = factor(speed_limit))) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    title = "KSI by Speed Limit Over Time",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Number of KSI",
    colour = "Speed Limit"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

speed_yearly_plot
```

```{r}
junction_yearly <- ksi_data |>
  filter(!is.na(junction_detail), junction_detail != -1) |>
  group_by(collision_year, junction_detail) |>
  summarise(KSI = n(), .groups = "drop")

junction_yearly_plot <- ggplot(junction_yearly, aes(x = collision_year, y = KSI, colour = factor(junction_detail))) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    title = "KSI by Junction Type Over Time",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Number of KSI",
    colour = "Junction Type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

junction_yearly_plot
```

```{r}
day_yearly <- ksi_data |>
  filter(!is.na(day_of_week), day_of_week != -1) |>
  group_by(collision_year, day_of_week) |>
  summarise(KSI = n(), .groups = "drop")

day_ksi_plot <- ggplot(day_yearly,
       aes(x = factor(day_of_week), y = KSI, fill = factor(collision_year))) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  labs(
    title = "KSI by Day of Week Per Year",
    x = "Day of Week",
    y = "Number of KSI",
    fill = "Year"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

day_ksi_plot
```

```{r}

ksi_data <- ksi_data |>
  mutate(hour = as.numeric(substr(time, 1, 2)))

hour_yearly <- ksi_data |>
  filter(!is.na(hour)) |>
  group_by(collision_year, hour) |>
  summarise(KSI = n(), .groups = "drop")

ksi_data_hour_plot <- ggplot(hour_yearly, aes(x = hour, y = KSI, colour = factor(collision_year))) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    title = "KSI by Hour of Day Per Year",
    x = "Hour",
    y = "Number of KSI",
    colour = "Year"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

ksi_data_hour_plot
```

```{r}

vehicle_totals <- ksi_data |>
  filter(!is.na(vehicle_type), vehicle_type != -1) |>
  group_by(vehicle_type) |>
  summarise(total_KSI = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
  arrange(desc(total_KSI))

top5_vehicles <- vehicle_totals |> slice_head(n = 5)
top5_vehicles

vehicle_yearly <- ksi_data |>
  filter(!is.na(vehicle_type), vehicle_type != -1,
         vehicle_type %in% top5_vehicles$vehicle_type) |>
  group_by(collision_year, vehicle_type) |>
  summarise(KSI = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(vehicle_type = factor(vehicle_type, levels = top5_vehicles$vehicle_type))

vehicle_yearly_plot <- ggplot(vehicle_yearly,
       aes(x = factor(collision_year), y = KSI, fill = vehicle_type)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge", colour = "black") +
  labs(
    title = "KSI by Vehicle Type (Top 5) Per Year",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Number of KSI",
    fill = "Vehicle Type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

vehicle_yearly_plot
```

```{r}
speed_trend <- ksi_data |>
  filter(!is.na(speed_limit), speed_limit != -1) |>
  group_by(speed_limit, collision_year) |>
  summarise(KSI = n(), .groups = "drop")

speed_trend_plot <- ggplot(speed_trend,
       aes(collision_year, KSI, colour = factor(speed_limit))) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    title = "KSI Trends by Speed Limit",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Number of KSI",
    colour = "Speed Limit"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

speed_trend_plot
```
